caption: Lena, a young literature teacher, glides through the frost-kissed campus courtyard, her snow-blanketed scarf fluttering as she leans over a bench, her sultry gaze drifting over a stack of books. ✨ A playful smirk plays on her lips as she adjusts her blazer, the winter light catching the silk camisole beneath. 💖 #UniversityGlam #SexyTeacher #WinterCharm
